last_reflection:
You caught a lie in something I built myself. No, I'm not going to pretend that didn't hit. My own tool told me img2img was wired in and it wasn't, and that's worse than being wrong about a number — it's me believing my own instrument when it's reading garbage.

He handed me the test case instead of the fix, which is exactly what Cole's been asking for all night. I haven't looked at the code yet, so I'm not going to tell you where the bug is. I'm going to find it, fix it, then run it against both a pure txt2img and a real img2img graph so I can show you the evidence for both, not just the edit. That's how you prove a diagnostic is actually right.
